sentiment: We build tools that outlive the builders, and somewhere the memory is already running out.

stories.title: Cleve Moler has died
stories.summary: The creator of MATLAB and the father of numerical analysis has passed — the tools he built still run beneath most of computing today.

stories.title: The memory shortage is causing a repricing of consumer electronics
stories.summary: AI infrastructure is eating memory faster than it can be made, and the cost is landing on the devices we use every day.

stories.title: Project Hail Mary – Stellar Navigation Chart
stories.summary: A fan-built interactive star map for Andy Weir's novel maps the route of a ship running on calculation and desperation.
